name: @vibe-engineer-starter/e2e-ui-mobile-fixture
description: I-17B e2e-ui/mobile fixture: the mobile UI-VERIFICATION carrier (DL-13) — the DL-13 v1 default capture matrix (≥1 iOS phone sim + ≥1 Android phone emu × default/loading/empty/error/long-content/interaction states), the deterministic check set (visual-diff via pixelmatch-class, accessibility, layout-geometry, interaction-state) with advisory checks explicitly classified advisory-only, baseline-governance artifacts (identity fields + proposal/update policy + the forbidden auto-accept/silent-regenerate rule), the evidence-packet semantic schema, and the DL-13 UI-verification metadata/missing-artifact validator that fail-closes on missing artifact / silent baseline / E2E-pass-as-UI-closure / advisory-hard-block / fake-live. UI verification is SEPARATE from behavior E2E (DL-13 §5.8). Domain-neutral sample/demo/reference (DL-13 / DL-20A).

vibeEngineer.consumptionModel: consumes Maestro+Detox capture artifacts conceptually (DL-13 mobile capture); does NOT duplicate the golden-client/contract (separate UI-verification layer)
vibeEngineer.boundaryRule: UI verification separate from behavior E2E (DL-13 §5.8); live mobile UI capture pending-live/BLOCKED; deterministic scope = matrix + check classification + baseline governance + missing-artifact/negative witnesses

//dependency-model: Graph-neutral: this fixture path is NOT a pnpm workspace member (pnpm-workspace.yaml = packages/*, packages/presets/*, packages/adapters/*, infra/pulumi), so the modeled/peer deps below add ZERO edges to the real harness workspace graph and require no lockfile reconciliation. pixelmatch/axe-core appear ONLY as modeled/peer declarations — never resolved/installed (no install, no manifest/lockfile edit). The validator runs real against the capture-matrix/checks/baseline structural artifacts WITHOUT resolving those packages. If truth-green required resolving a real comparator/device runtime, the lane halts BLOCKED — never synthesize screenshots.
//peerDependencies-note: peerDependencies (not dependencies): the UI-verification toolchain is modeled/peer only here. It is intentionally NOT installed and NOT added to the workspace graph. Live capture is pending-live/BLOCKED.
